title: coronidium elatum
intro: Coronidium elatum, also known as the tall daisy or golden everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to southwestern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Coronidium elatum include reducing inflammation, soothing pain, and promoting healing, which can be beneficial for conditions such as eczema, acne, and bronchitis. Coronidium elatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
